history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with messy black hair, wearing a black t-shirt and a silver ring on their index finger, holds a purple and silver can of drink up to their mouth. They are also wearing a white wireless earbud in their right ear and a braided bracelet on their left wrist. The background is a wall covered in various posters, including a yellow poster with a smiley face and the words "SMILE YOU ARE ON CCTV" printed upside down, a poster of AC/DC, a Nirvana poster, and several other black and white band or movie posters. The lighting is dim and moody, with a warm glow illuminating the person's arm and face. The overall style is reminiscent of a vintage, grunge aesthetic, with a sense of casual introspection. The color palette is dominated by dark tones, with pops of color from the yellow poster and the drink can.
